market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected due to heavily positive GEX across all expiries, creating a pinning effect.
outlook.summary: The market is in a strong positive GEX environment (over 0.6B combined), indicating dealer long gamma which suppresses volatility. Spot is trapped between two massive Call concentrations at 26700 and 26900. A 'reverse smirk' volatility skew confirms the bullish underlying sentiment, suggesting a stable, grinding upward trend with strict containment by Dealer hedging flows.

levels.motivazione: Major Call resistance with massive 0DTE volume (1724) and strong Monthly OI (463). Dealers will aggressively sell into upward probes here.
Ground-zero for Dealer hedging with extreme 0DTE Call volume (3148) and Monthly Call volume (3891). Positive GEX creates a magnetic support floor beneath spot.
Significant Call open interest across 0DTE, Weekly, and Monthly expiries. Acts as an ultimate upside cap for the current trend.
Highest volume Put strike in 0DTE (825 Vol) establishing a definitive structural downside support.
Secondary support validated across 0DTE and Monthly expiries, backed by solid Put open interest.
